title: calypso bulbosa subsp. americana
intro: Calypso bulbosa subsp. americana, also known as the American calypso orchid or fairy slipper, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Calypso bulbosa subsp. americana include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve immune function, and even have antitumor properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are typically dried and made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, although it's essential to note that its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare practitioner.
